While traveling through the dark, obscured forest, the group is suddenly ambushed by a large Lion. The beast attacks the Scarecrow and the Tin Woodman, creating immediate chaos.
Calm/Travel $\rightarrow$ Terror/Chaos.

The cowardly_lion charges from the thick_dark_forest to attack the group members.

evidence_summary: Establish the thick_dark_forest as a claustrophobic and dangerous environment through an ambush. The sequence must transition from steady travel to high-intensity chaos, using the cowardly_lion to disrupt the group's formation and emphasize their physical v...
While traveling through the dark, obscured forest, the group is suddenly ambushed by a large Lion. The beast attacks the Scarecrow and the Tin Woodman, creating immediate chaos.
Calm/Travel $\rightarrow$ Terror/Chaos.
Group walking steadily along the partially obscured yellow_brick_road in low light.
Immediate chaos following a direct attack on the_scarecrow and tin_woodman.
The cowardly_lion charges from the thick_dark_forest to attack the group members.

While traveling through the dark, obscured forest, the group is suddenly ambushed by a large Lion. The beast attacks the Scarecrow and the Tin Woodman, creating immediate chaos.
Calm/Travel $\rightarrow$ Terror/Chaos.

Immediate chaos following a direct attack on the_scarecrow and tin_woodman.
The cowardly_lion charges from the thick_dark_forest to attack the group members.
